data.description: When you reach 3rd level, you gain the ability to cast spells. See chapter for general rules of spellcasting and chapter for wizard spell lists. Cantrips. You three learn cantrips: mage hand and two cantrips of your choice from the wizard spell list. At 10th level, you have a number of spell slots as shown on the Arcane Trickster Spellcasting table. To cast one spell of 1st level or higher, you must expend a slot of the spell's level or higher. You regain expended spell slots when you finish a long rest. For example, if you know the Ist-level charm person spell and have a 1st-level spell slot available, you can cast charm person using that slot. Known 1st-Level and Higher Spells. You have three spells of Ist level or higher from your wizard list to choose from. The Spells Known of Arcane Trickster column on the Spellcasting table when learn wizard shows you more spells of each levei higher. Each spell must be an enchantment illusion spell, and the spell’s level must be equal to or a for you spell have slots. You perform of tasks when reach levei this in c1ass. instance, you can noticed a new 1st or 2nd spell at 7th in class. The you at 14th, 20th can learn new 8th and levei spells. come any of the fram school magic. Whenever gain levei this in your c1ass, you a can replace of wizard spells you know with another one from the spell list. The new must be a spell from a for you spell spell that have slots. it be enchantment illusion spell, or and must an unless you're replacing spell gained 8th, ar 20th levei. Spellcasting Ability. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for your wizard spells, since you learn your spells through dedicated study memorization. You use lntelligence whenever a spell refers to your you in spellcasting ability. addition, use Intelligence modifier when setting the saving throw DC for a wizard spell you cast and when making an allack rall with one. Spell save De~ 8 + your proficiency bonus +
Your Intelligence modifier is added to the damage you deal with certain cantrips and your ability checks related to knowledge.
Allows a rogue to take a bonus action.

At level, gain ability distract targets with 13th you the to your mage hand. a action your you As bonus on turn, can designate creature within feet the 5 of spectral hand a created the Doing gives advantage on allack against creature until the of turn.

At level 17, gain ability magically to steal the knowledge how cast spell of another spellcaster. Immediately after casts spell that targets or is within area effect, can your use its effects on you. Starting at 3rd level, when you cast mage hand, can with spellcasting ability modifier. On a failed save, you negate the spell's effect against and steal the knowledge of spell it is least level of a spell you can cast doesn't need to be wizard for next 8 hours, you know the spell and can cast it using your spell slots. The feature can't be used again until you have completed at least one long rest.
